name: Gourmet Beef Tenderloins
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the grill.
2. When ready to grill, place steaks on gas grill over medium heat or charcoal grill 4-6 inches from medium coals.
3. Cook for 14-25 minutes depending on desired doneness, turning once.
4. In a small saucepan, combine cheese spread, half and half, and pepper; blend well.
5. Cook over medium heat until the cheese melts and the mixture is smooth, stirring constantly.
6. Stir in mushrooms until heated, stirring constantly.
7. Serve over steaks.
